isolation.boundary: repo working tree plus assigned evidence/report paths only

assertions.title: Special Moves — Castling All Four Types

steps.action: Inspect native castling coverage in engine/tests/test_legality.c:190-375
steps.expected: Coverage should include all four castling moves, blocker cases, and castling-rights updates
steps.observed: test_castling_generation_and_blockers and test_castling_make_move_and_rights_updates cover white/black O-O and O-O-O, attacked transit/destination squares, occupied path, king-in-check, king move, rook move, rook capture, and make/unmake restoration

steps.expected: Legality coverage passes in the compiled test-runner surface
steps.observed: native-engine-command.log shows 'PASS: 7 legality tests passed' and 'PASS: all engine tests passed'

evidence.commandOutput: PASS: 7 legality tests passed; PASS: all engine tests passed

steps.action: Inspect native en passant coverage in engine/tests/test_legality.c:378-439
steps.expected: Coverage should include legal en passant, captured-pawn removal, expiry after one move, and illegal pinned/discovered-check cases
steps.observed: test_en_passant_legality_and_expiry checks legal e.p. generation, pawn removal from d5, clearing en passant square, halfmove reset, expiry after a quiet move, and rejects pinned and discovered-check en passant captures

steps.expected: Legality coverage passes in the compiled test-runner surface
steps.observed: native-engine-command.log shows 'PASS: 7 legality tests passed' and 'PASS: all engine tests passed'

evidence.commandOutput: PASS: 7 legality tests passed; PASS: all engine tests passed

steps.action: Inspect native promotion coverage in engine/tests/test_legality.c:441-475
steps.expected: Coverage should include all four promotion pieces for push and capture promotions for both colors
steps.observed: test_promotion_legal_generation verifies 8 promotion moves from b7 and 8 from a2, including queen/rook/bishop/knight push promotions and capture promotions for white and black

steps.expected: Legality coverage passes in the compiled test-runner surface
steps.observed: native-engine-command.log shows 'PASS: 7 legality tests passed' and 'PASS: all engine tests passed'

evidence.commandOutput: PASS: 7 legality tests passed; PASS: all engine tests passed

steps.action: Inspect native check-evasion coverage in engine/tests/test_legality.c:477-560
steps.expected: Coverage should include single-check evasions, double-check king-only moves, pin filtering, checkmate, and stalemate
steps.observed: test_legal_move_filtering_and_pins verifies single-check king/block/capture options, rejects unrelated moves, enforces king-only moves in double check, and restricts pinned rook movement to the pin ray; test_mate_and_stalemate_detection verifies zero legal moves for checkmate and stalemate with correct classification

steps.expected: Legality coverage passes in the compiled test-runner surface
steps.observed: native-engine-command.log shows 'PASS: 7 legality tests passed' and 'PASS: all engine tests passed'

evidence.commandOutput: PASS: 7 legality tests passed; PASS: all engine tests passed

steps.action: Inspect native FEN round-trip coverage in engine/tests/test_board.c:116-230
steps.expected: Coverage should include starting position, complex positions, en passant positions, all castling-right combinations, and a position containing all 12 piece types
steps.observed: test_fen_roundtrip_known_positions includes the starting position, complex midgames, and a mixed-material position with all 12 piece types; test_all_castling_right_combinations iterates all 16 castling masks; test_en_passant_roundtrip_positions checks representative a3/d3/h3 and a6/d6/h6 en passant targets

steps.expected: Board/FEN coverage passes in the compiled test-runner surface
steps.observed: native-engine-command.log shows 'PASS: 8 board representation tests passed' and 'PASS: all engine tests passed'

evidence.commandOutput: PASS: 8 board representation tests passed; PASS: all engine tests passed

steps.action: Inspect native make/unmake integrity coverage in engine/tests/test_legality.c:60-116 and 563-652
steps.expected: Coverage should prove state restoration for quiet, capture, castling, en passant, and promotion moves, including bitboards, hashes, castling rights, en passant square, and halfmove clock across deep recursion
steps.observed: position_fields_equal compares piece bitboards, occupancies, mailbox, PST caches, side-to-move, castling rights, en passant square, halfmove/fullmove clocks, zobrist hash, and pawn hash; test_make_unmake_integrity exercises quiet, capture, castling, en passant, push promotion, capture promotion, then verify_recursive_integrity(depth=3) from start position and asserts visited_nodes > 20

steps.expected: Legality coverage passes in the compiled test-runner surface
steps.observed: native-engine-command.log shows 'PASS: 7 legality tests passed' and 'PASS: all engine tests passed'

evidence.commandOutput: PASS: 7 legality tests passed; PASS: all engine tests passed

frictions.description: The native test binary reports suite-level PASS lines but not per-test names, so assertion mapping required source inspection alongside the command output.
frictions.resolution: Mapped each assigned assertion to explicit test functions and line ranges in engine/tests/test_legality.c and engine/tests/test_board.c before interpreting the suite PASS output.

summary: Tested 6 assigned move-generation legality/state assertions via the native engine test-runner. All 6 passed based on matching native test coverage plus successful command output ('PASS: 7 legality tests passed', 'PASS: 8 board representation tests passed', and 'PASS: all engine tests passed').
